text: Stepping inside this exhibition space, I am struck by the sterile, modern environment—the glass walls and crisp lighting suggest a place of knowledge and experimentation. The words 'Responsive and rapidly evolving' and 'research innovating how humans interact' echo in my mind, inviting reflection on the relentless march of technology and our place within it. I feel both a sense of curiosity and a subtle unease, aware that we are always negotiating new ways to connect within and beyond ourselves.
